calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-15-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Continued To Jul-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Peebles for Belinda Evans II.

Ms. Peebles requested a one week continuance stating that she was out of town and that she did not have an opportunity to file a response to the Probate Examiner's notes. The First and Final Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to July 15, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
